manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are participating in a collaborative guessing game.
The goal is to find out whether this grid and another picture only I can see, are the same.
Please describe your grid first. Then, I will provide my description and we can ask each other questions about the grids to figure out whether they are the same. Now start your short grid description with "DESCRIPTION:" followed by the description. Do not add anything else. This is your grid:
X ▢ ▢ ▢ X
X X ▢ X X
X ▢ X ▢ X
X ▢ ▢ ▢ X
X ▢ ▢ ▢ X

message.content: else.DESCRIPTION: A 5×5 grid. Column 1 and column 5 are all X's. Row 1 has X's at columns 1 and 5. Row 2 has X's at columns 1, 2, 4, 5. Row 3 has X's at columns 1, 3, 5. Rows 4 and 5 have X's only at columns 1 and 5. The remaining cells are empty (▢).
message.reasoning:
The user wants a collaborative guessing game. They want the assistant to first describe the grid, starting with "DESCRIPTION:" then description, nothing else. So I should provide a short description of the grid. The grid is given as characters: rows of 5. Represent maybe X marks and empty boxes. The description should be concise: It's a 5x5 grid, with X pattern shape maybe like a plus sign? Let's see: Row1: X ▢ ▢ ▢ X (X at corners). Row2: X X ▢ X X (top row plus a middle). Row3: X ▢ X ▢ X (X at corners and middle). Row4: X ▢ ▢ ▢ X (X at corners). Row5: X ▢ ▢ ▢ X (same as row4). So overall shape maybe a kind of "U" with extra? It's like a border left column all X, right column all X, top row corners X, rest interior pattern.

So description: 5x5 grid, first column all X, last column all X, top row has X at both ends, second row has X at first three? Actually second row: X X ▢ X X (so second column also X, fourth also X). Third row: X ▢ X ▢ X (center X). Fourth and fifth rows: X ▢ ▢ ▢ X. So maybe describe as: a solid left and right border, with additional X's forming a shape resembling a hollow square with a filled vertical line on left and right.

But they ask "short grid description". So I can say: "A 5×5 grid with X's forming solid left and right columns; top row has X's at both corners, second row has X's in columns 1,2,4,5, third row X's in columns 1,3,5, and rows 4-5 X's only in columns 1 and 5."

Make sure start "DESCRIPTION:" and nothing
